goal: Implement the FileEasy admin page core for file listing, search, preview, rename, download, single delete, and batch delete within the approved product scope.
nonGoals: Do not add log query pages or dashboards.
Do not extend preview to unsupported office document types.

acceptanceChecks.text: When an authenticated admin opens /admin, they should be able to list, search, preview, rename, download, delete, and batch delete files within the approved scope.
When a user attempts to rename a file, the UI and API integration should only allow the base name to change and should not allow extension changes.
Visually confirm that admin interactions follow the approved FileEasy visual and wireframe guidance without adding dashboard-style or logging surfaces.

publishPolicy.commitMessage: FE-T005: FileEasy admin page file management core
publishPolicy.prTitle: FE-T005: FileEasy admin page file management core

handoffQuestions: List only remaining admin page product gaps that require PM review.
